not_assessed.label: Not Assessed
not_assessed.description: This observation was intentionally not assessed.

too_little.label: Too Little
too_little.description: The observed characteristic is present, but insufficient for the intended technique.

good.label: Good
good.description: The observed characteristic is appropriate for the intended technique.

excellent.label: Excellent
excellent.description: The observed characteristic is demonstrated exceptionally well.

too_much.label: Too Much
too_much.description: The observed characteristic is excessive for the intended technique.

unclear.label: Unclear
unclear.description: The observation cannot be judged reliably from the available evidence.
